steps.title: Identify the key contrast
steps.content: The word “but” marks a shift from her early career (works “displayed in outdoor public spaces”) to now (works in museums). The blank needs a verb that shows how her works currently exist in these institutional spaces—parallel to “displayed.”

steps.title: Apply the meaning to the choices
steps.content: The target meaning is “displayed” or “prominently shown.” “Featured” directly captures this—to feature works is to display them prominently in a collection, exactly mirroring “displayed in outdoor public spaces.” The other three shift away from this display concept: “invented” focuses on creation, “adjusted” on modification, and “recommended” on endorsement. That matches choice C — C is correct.
